flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Alabama at Birmingham fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (13.3k → 11.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Alabama at Birmingham rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.4k → $22.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Alabama at Birmingham fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Alabama at Birmingham are 20% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($54.5k vs $45.2k).
